ddls:
CREATE TABLE "production_lines" (
  "production_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production line */,
  "production_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the production line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the production line */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the production line within the facility */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the production line (e.g., operational, maintenance, offline) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production line manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "production_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production line where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., temperature, pressure, flow rate) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor on the production line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "next_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled calibration */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_production_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("production_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor type (e.g., °C, psi, m³/min) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that took the reading */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time the reading was taken */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reading (e.g., valid, invalid, warning) */,
  "sensor_status_at_reading" TEXT /* Status of the sensor at the time of the reading */,
  "production_line_status_at_reading" TEXT /* Status of the production line at the time of the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "slpm_values" (
  "slpm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SLPM value */,
  "production_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production line where the SLPM value was measured */,
  "slpm_value" REAL /* SLPM value */,
  "slpm_time" TEXT /* Time the SLPM value was measured */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the SLPM value (e.g., valid, invalid, warning) */,
  "production_line_status_at_measured" TEXT /* Status of the production line at the time of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("slpm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_slpm_values_production_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("production_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that was calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the calibration was performed */,
  "calibration_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the calibration */,
  "calibrated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the calibration */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Status of the calibration (e.g., successful, failed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibrations_calibrated_by FOREIGN KEY ("calibrated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibrations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the maintenance */,
  "maintained_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, in progress, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_maintained_by FOREIGN KEY ("maintained_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., production manager, maintenance personnel, quality control engineer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the data was accessed */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "accessed_data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., sensor data, production line data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor configuration */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that was configured */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration */,
  "config_time" TEXT /* Time the configuration was made */,
  "configured_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who configured the sensor */,
  "configuration_status" TEXT /* Status of the configuration (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_configurations_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_configurations_configured_by FOREIGN KEY ("configured_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_configuration_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration history entry */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration that was changed */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Time the configuration was changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_status" TEXT /* Status of the change (e.g., successful, failed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_configuration_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_configuration_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES sensor_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_line_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "production_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production line that was measured */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., throughput, quality) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_time" TEXT /* Time the performance metric was measured */,
  "performance_status" TEXT /* Status of the performance metric (e.g., good, warning, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_line_performance_production_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_line_id") REFERENCES production_lines ("production_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., pump, valve) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "equipment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the equipment (e.g., operational, maintenance, offline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the maintenance */,
  "maintained_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, in progress, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_maintenance_maintained_by FOREIGN KEY ("maintained_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_maintenance_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment that was measured */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., efficiency, reliability) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_time" TEXT /* Time the performance metric was measured */,
  "performance_status" TEXT /* Status of the performance metric (e.g., good, warning, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_performance_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)
